questionHtml: The girl chooses to jump so that she lands on loosely-packed snow rather than frozen ice. Outline why she chooses to land on the snow.
markschemeHtml:
same change in momentum/impulse

the time taken «to stop» would be greater «with the snow»

F = Δ p Δ t therefore F is smaller «with the snow»

OR

force is proportional to rate of change of momentum therefore F is smaller «with the snow»

Allow reverse argument for ice

meta.title: The girl chooses to jump so that she lands on loosely-packed snow rather than frozen ice. Outline why she chooses to land on the snow.
